description: Add isPreviewMode defense-in-depth guards to inline mutation handlers in the multi-select floating action bar (Delete, Duplicate, Link, Group buttons)
steps: Add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` as the first statement inside the Delete button's onClick closure
Add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` as the first statement inside the Duplicate button's onClick closure
Add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` as the first statement inside the Link button's onClick closure
Add `if (isPreviewMode) return;` as the first statement inside the Group button's onClick closure
Run npm run build to verify no compilation errors
acceptance_criteria: The Delete button onClick handler checks isPreviewMode before any mutation
The Duplicate button onClick handler checks isPreviewMode before any mutation
The Link button onClick handler checks isPreviewMode before any mutation
The Group button onClick handler checks isPreviewMode before any mutation
npm run build succeeds with no errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
findings: Build passes. Guard count increased from 60 to 64 (4 new guards). All 4 multi-select action bar mutation buttons now have internal isPreviewMode guards for defense-in-depth.
